productDisplayName: Puma Men 917Lo Riddim 50s oc Black Casual Shoes
description: Absolutely stylish, comfortable and different, the puma 917 Lo Riddim 50s OC sneakers are great for urban wear. Inspired by the German reggae, dance hall and cutlure magazine - Riddim, these shoes look great when teamed with jeans and tees. Upper Printed canvas uppers for protection, comfort and style Lace-ups for snug Fit Extra pair of laces provided for a different look Brand name printed on the tongue and embroidered behind the collar Rubber toe-guard for better protection Midsole Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Durable rubber outsole with check pattern and suction grooves for better grip Flex grooves for better flexibility of the feet
